steps.title: Square the conversion factor to convert area units
steps.content:
Since 1 meter = 3.28 feet, we must square both sides to convert from square feet to square meters:
$$1 \text{ m}^2 = (3.28)^2 \text{ ft}^2 = 10.7584 \text{ ft}^2$$

steps.title: Convert the rate from square feet per hour to square meters per hour
steps.content:
To convert 280 square feet per hour to square meters per hour, divide by the conversion factor:
$$280 \text{ ft}^2/\text{hr} = \frac{280}{10.7584} \text{ m}^2/\text{hr} \approx 26.013 \text{ m}^2/\text{hr}$$

steps.title: Convert from per hour to per minute
steps.content:
Divide by 60 to convert from an hourly rate to a per-minute rate:
$$\frac{26.013 \text{ m}^2/\text{hr}}{60 \text{ min/hr}} \approx 0.433 \text{ m}^2/\text{min}$$
This is closest to 0.43. That matches choice A — A is correct.
